---
title: "Teaching"
description-meta: "Courses taught by Sam Hsu as a teaching assistant at the University of Chicago, including PhD Applied Econometrics."
---

- **Applied Econometrics II** (PhD), TA, 2026 [[Evaluations](files/26winter_TA_metricsII.png)]
- **Order and Violence** (Master's), TA, 2025 [(TAs were not evaluated by school policy.)]{.eval-note}
- **Why We Fight** (Undergrad), TA, 2025 [[Evaluations](files/25fall_TA_whywefight.png)]
